---
title: "Join"
---

## Opportunities

We’re open to highly motivated collaborators who want to build **useful, clinically grounded** stroke research and neuroAI.

**Good fits**
- Undergrad / med students who can commit consistently (data + writing)
- Residents/fellows interested in outcomes/epidemiology or imaging/AI
- Research engineers / data scientists (Python, EHR data, NLP, imaging)

**What to email**
Send **CV + 2–3 sentences** describing your interests and what you want to learn/build. If you have it, include a short writing sample or GitHub/code snippet.

## Contact
**Liqi Shu, MD**  
UPMC Department of Neurology  
200 Lothrop St, Pittsburgh, PA 15213  

**Email:** shuliqi@gmail.com
